_doc: SEO source of truth for the live site. `pages` keys MUST equal real routes in src/app — listed paths drive per-route metadata via getSeoEntry() in src/lib/seo.ts. `pending` is a planning area for routes that don't exist yet; build the page first, then move the entry into `pages`. Updated during May 2026 SEO audit remediation.

site.name: Elchai Group
site.description: Elchai Group is a Dubai-based AI and blockchain consultancy. We design, build and scale custom AI agents, generative AI, Web3 platforms, smart contracts and tokenization for enterprises worldwide.

/.title: Elchai Group — AI & Blockchain Consultancy in Dubai
/.description: Custom AI agents, generative AI, smart contracts and RWA tokenization built by Elchai Group in Dubai. 150+ projects since 2016 across enterprise and government.
/.h1: Driving Digital Transformation with AI & Blockchain Products

/about-us.title: About Elchai Group
/about-us.description: Dubai-based AI and blockchain consultancy founded in 2016. Meet the team building Tarality, BB-Estate, Blyncc and 150+ partner projects.

/portfolios.title: Portfolio — Apps, Platforms & Products by Elchai
/portfolios.description: Selected AI, blockchain and Web3 products Elchai has shipped with partners across finance, real estate and government.

/case-study.title: Case Studies — Results From Real Projects
/case-study.description: How Elchai delivered measurable outcomes across AI, blockchain and Web3 engagements — case studies from Tarality, BB-Estate, Blyncc and partner builds.

/blog-list.title: Blog — AI, Blockchain & Web3 Insights
/blog-list.description: Insights, tutorials and analysis on AI, blockchain, Web3 and digital transformation from the Elchai Group team in Dubai.

/live-demo.title: Live Demos — Production Builds in Motion
/live-demo.description: Watch production AI, blockchain, Web3 and cryptocurrency platforms Elchai has built — playing live.

/interns.title: Interns at Elchai Group
/interns.description: Launch your career with Elchai World Internships — real projects, mentorship and global exposure in Dubai.

/privacy-policy.title: Privacy Policy
/privacy-policy.description: How Elchai Group collects, uses and safeguards your personal information.

/blockchain-development.title: Blockchain Development Company in Dubai
/blockchain-development.description: Build immutable, auditable blockchain infrastructure with Elchai. 200+ smart contracts deployed, 30+ industries, multi-chain delivery from Dubai.

/web3-development-company.title: Web3 Development Company — Dubai & Global
/web3-development-company.description: Production Web3 platforms: wallets, dApps, NFT marketplaces, DAOs. Multi-chain stack, regulated jurisdictions, Dubai HQ.

/smart-contract.title: Smart Contract Development & Audit
/smart-contract.description: Audited Solidity/Rust contracts for DeFi, RWA, NFT, custody. Formal verification, OpenZeppelin patterns, multi-sig governance. 200+ contracts shipped.

/defi-development.title: DeFi Development Company
/defi-development.description: Lending, AMM, staking and yield protocols engineered for security and composability. Cross-chain, oracle-integrated, institutional-grade. Dubai-based.

/dapp-development.title: dApp Development Services
/dapp-development.description: End-to-end decentralized application development — wallets, smart-contract integrations, dashboards. Audited code, multi-chain, production-ready.

/nft-marketplace-development.title: NFT Marketplace Development
/nft-marketplace-development.description: Custom NFT marketplaces with minting, royalties, lazy-mint, multi-chain support and KYC-ready storefronts. Built by Elchai for collectors and brands.

/metaverse-development.title: Metaverse Development Dubai
/metaverse-development.description: Virtual real estate, 3D environments, avatar systems and immersive experiences. Built by Elchai for brands stepping into the next internet.

/rwa.title: Real-World Asset Tokenization Services
/rwa.description: Tokenize real estate, debt, commodities and funds on regulated rails. KYC/AML, custody and secondary-market design. UAE / VARA aware.

/blockchain-consulting-services.title: Blockchain Consulting Services
/blockchain-consulting-services.description: Strategy, compliance and platform selection from specialized blockchain consultants. Integrate blockchain into your business, with a clear roadmap.

/layer-1.title: Layer 1 Blockchain Development
/layer-1.description: Build sovereign Layer 1 chains — consensus, virtual machines, validator design and full-node tooling. Production stacks engineered by Elchai.

/layer-2.title: Layer 2 Blockchain Development
/layer-2.description: Rollups, sidechains and scaling solutions for high-throughput dApps. ZK and optimistic stacks, bridge design and L1 settlement.

/crypto-wallet-development-company.title: Crypto Wallet Development
/crypto-wallet-development-company.description: Hot, cold and custodial crypto wallets for iOS, Android and Web. Hardware-key, MPC and multi-sig support — secure by design.

/custodial-wallet.title: Custodial Wallet Development
/custodial-wallet.description: Institutional-grade custodial wallets with HSM-backed key management, audit trails and regulator-friendly compliance flows.

/decentralized-exchange.title: Decentralized Exchange (DEX) Development
/decentralized-exchange.description: AMM, order-book and hybrid DEX development. Multi-chain liquidity, MEV protection and auditable smart contracts. Built by Elchai.

/centralized-exchange.title: Centralized Exchange (CEX) Development
/centralized-exchange.description: Spot, margin and derivatives CEX development with matching-engine performance, KYC/AML flows and VARA-aware compliance.

/ico-development.title: ICO Development Services
/ico-development.description: End-to-end Initial Coin Offering development — tokenomics, smart contracts, KYC/AML, whitepaper review and launch infrastructure.

/ido-development.title: IDO Launchpad Development
/ido-development.description: Build Initial DEX Offering launchpads with vesting, whitelisting and multi-chain support. Compliance-aware tokenomics from Elchai.

/meme-coin-development.title: Meme Coin Development
/meme-coin-development.description: Build community-first meme coins with secure tokenomics, anti-bot protections and exchange-ready audits. Risk-aware launches by Elchai.

/token-development.title: Token Development Services
/token-development.description: ERC-20, ERC-1155, SPL and custom token standards. Tokenomics design, vesting, compliance, audits and exchange listings.

/ai-development.title: AI Development Company in Dubai
/ai-development.description: Custom AI application development — chatbots, AI agents, automation, NLP and computer vision. Built by Elchai for global enterprises.

/ai-consulting-services.title: AI Consulting Services — Dubai
/ai-consulting-services.description: Strategy, roadmap and build for generative AI, agents and RAG. From PoC to production: discovery, architecture, deployment, SLA.

/ai-integration.title: AI Integration Services
/ai-integration.description: Embed AI into existing products and back-office systems. APIs, eval harnesses, observability and human-in-the-loop guardrails.

/ai-automation.title: AI Automation Services
/ai-automation.description: Automate operational workflows with AI agents, RPA and intelligent document processing. Measurable cost reduction, audit-ready logs.

/ai-tool.title: Custom AI Tool Development
/ai-tool.description: Custom internal AI tools for ops, research and operations teams. Built fast, scoped tight, shipped with guardrails.

/ai-assistant-development.title: AI Assistant Development
/ai-assistant-development.description: Production-grade AI assistants for support, sales and ops. Voice, chat and multimodal — grounded in your data and policies.

/ai-agent-development.title: AI Agent Development
/ai-agent-development.description: Agentic AI systems that plan, use tools and operate within human-in-the-loop guardrails. From PoC to production-grade deployments.

/generative-ai-development.title: Generative AI Development
/generative-ai-development.description: Generative AI applications and agents — from chat experiences to multi-modal content production. Built on OpenAI, Anthropic and open-weight models.

/llm-development-partner.title: LLM Development Partner
/llm-development-partner.description: Fine-tune, evaluate and host LLMs. RAG pipelines, function calling, eval harnesses and observability. Stack-agnostic.

/rag-development-company.title: RAG Development Company
/rag-development-company.description: Production retrieval-augmented generation: vector and hybrid retrieval, re-ranking, citations and evals. Reduce hallucination, increase grounding.

/computer-vision-software-development.title: Computer Vision Development
/computer-vision-software-development.description: Object detection, OCR, defect inspection, video analytics and real-time tracking. Production CV pipelines from Elchai.

/machine-learning-development.title: Machine Learning Development
/machine-learning-development.description: Custom ML models for forecasting, classification, recommendation and anomaly detection. Production MLOps from data to deployment.

/rpa-development-partner.title: RPA Development Partner
/rpa-development-partner.description: Robotic Process Automation with AI-assisted bots. Document workflows, ERP integrations and audit-ready logs.

/ai-voice-assist.title: AI Voice Assistant Development
/ai-voice-assist.description: Voice-first AI assistants with low-latency speech, multilingual support and brand-aligned persona. Built for support and sales.

/ai-fintech-solutions.title: AI for Fintech — Banking, Payments, Compliance
/ai-fintech-solutions.description: AI agents for KYC, fraud, underwriting and treasury. UAE-compliant (CBUAE/DFSA), bank-grade security, model-risk governance built-in.

/ai-banking-solutions.title: AI Banking Solutions
/ai-banking-solutions.description: AI for retail and commercial banks — KYC, fraud, document automation and personalization. Production-grade with audit-ready logs.

/ai-logistics-software.title: AI Logistics Software
/ai-logistics-software.description: Routing, demand forecasting, last-mile optimization and warehouse vision systems. AI logistics built by Elchai.

/ai-education-software.title: AI Education Software
/ai-education-software.description: Adaptive learning, tutoring agents, grading automation and content generation. AI for K-12, higher-ed and corporate training.

/ai-real-estate.title: AI Real Estate Solutions — Dubai
/ai-real-estate.description: AI for listings, lead routing, valuations and CRM. UAE-focused AI for brokers, developers and proptech. Built by Elchai in Dubai.

/mobile-app-development.title: Mobile App Development Company in Dubai
/mobile-app-development.description: iOS, Android and cross-platform apps. SwiftUI, Kotlin, React Native and Flutter. From product discovery to App Store launch.
